events.name: PhD Club & GSA Clearwater Sail
events.location: Atlantic Basin, Red Hook, Brooklyn NY
events.description:
Join the PhD Club and GSA aboard the historic sloop Clearwater for a sail on the water! Open to all NJIT graduate students.
⚠️ Travel note: Public transit from NJIT takes ~2 hours each way. Plan your full day — depart NJIT by 10:45 AM to arrive on time. Return estimated ~5:30 PM.
RSVP is required. Organized by PhD Club and GSA NJIT.
